title: GoGeiLi Cake Knife and Serving Set in Black, 33cm(13-inch) Stainless Steel Cake Knife Set, Elegant Cake Knife Set for Wedding, Birthday, Parties, Anniversary
features: Packing Content: This cake cutting set includes 1 pc black cake knife and 1 pc black cake pie server spatula.

Premium Material: GoGeiLi black wedding cake cutter set is made of high quality 18/0 food grade stainless steel, durable and rust-proof. 13 inches long of the cake knife and 9.3 inches long of the cake server help you to cut the cake and serve the slicers easily.

Well Made: The classical decorative pattern adds elegance to this black wedding cake serving set. Mirror finished and shiny black coating of the surface showcase your unique fashionable flair and add fun to festival occasions, dishwasher safe for years.

Nice-grip Handle: The steel unibody design of the cake knife and server are very sturdy, you Do Not worry about bend or broken issues. The handle of the wedding knife is ergonomic and nice-grip, neither flimsy nor short, proper size and weight to make you hold and use comfortably.
Widely Used: The cake cutting set can be used more than for weddings, birthdays, parties, banquets, anniversaries, housewarming and any other occasions, or for everyday uses.
description: Product Description Black Stainless Steel Cake Knife and Server Set, GoGeiLi Black Cake Pie Cutting Set for Weddings, Parties, Birthdays, Anniversaries, Banquets. Packing content: 1 piece cake knife and 1 piece cake pie server spatula. Length: Cake knife: 13 inches, Cake server: 9.3 inches Surface: Mirror finish, black. Perfect for cutting and slicing cake, pie, pizza, lasagna and other desserts. Great for weddings, birthdays, parties, banquets, anniversaries, housewarming and any other occasions, or for everyday uses. Food-grade Materials Made of Grade 430 stainless steel, healthy, durable and rust-proof. Ergonomic Design Nice-grip handle to use and hold comfortably. Solid Handle Not like other cake server set with flimsy crystal/plastic handles that break or bend easily. Long Blade Long and curved design of the blade to cut easily. Tips: After cleaning, wipe it dry with a soft towel and store it in a dry place to ensure its durability. Please Do Not use wire brushes or hard sponges when cleaning to avoid scratching the surface.
